text.zh: 时序差分更新 是当前 legacy 展示中的一个 AI 历史节点。
text.en: Temporal-Difference Update is an AI history milestone in the current legacy presentation.

text.zh: 时序差分学习为强化学习提供了一种从经验中学习预测的紧凑方法。TD 方法不必等到最终结果，而是用下一步奖励和下一步预测来更新价值估计。这种自举思想支撑了 TD-Gammon、Q-learning 和 actor-critic 等后续算法。
text.en: Temporal-difference learning gave reinforcement learning a compact way to learn predictions from experience. Instead of waiting for a final outcome, TD methods update value estimates using the next reward and the next prediction. This bootstrapping idea sits behind many later algorithms, including TD-Gammon, Q-learning, and actor-critic methods.
